ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of day the data was collected */,
  "thick1" REAL /* Thickness of the first layer */,
  "thick2" REAL /* Thickness of the second layer */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean thickness */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of thickness */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data collection point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "source_model" TEXT /* Model of the data collection device */,
  "source_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is archived */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is archived */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_weather_data" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "data_id")
)
